mimo-copilot.walkthrough.title: Get Started with MiMo
mimo-copilot.walkthrough.description: Set up MiMo-v2.5-pro in Copilot Chat
mimo-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.title: Set your API Key
mimo-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.descr: Run **MiMo: Set API Key** to configure your MiMo API key.
mimo-copilot.walkthrough.showModels.desc: Open Copilot Chat, click the model picker, and select **MiMo-v2.5-pro**.
mimo-copilot.config.title: MiMo Copilot
mimo-copilot.config.baseUrl.description: API endpoint base URL. Change this for self-hosted or proxy deployments.
mimo-copilot.config.maxTokens.descriptio: Maximum output tokens. Set to 0 for API default (no limit).
mimo-copilot.config.modelIdOverrides.des: Override the API model ID sent to the endpoint. Useful for third-party API proxies with different model names.
